results.title: Big names axed from popular awards show - News.com.au
results.description: Big names axed from popular awards show News.com.au Emmys to Move Five Categories Out of NBC Telecast In a Bid to Revamp the Ceremony (EXCLUSIVE) Variety DGA, WGA & SAG-AFTRA Protest Emmys' Decision To Cut Categories Deadline Emmys pull 5 categories from NBC telecast — what’s moving and why the guilds are fuming Gold Derby Television Academy cuts several major categories from Emmys 2026 telecast in shocking move Page Six
